reason: Stopped after next_action=early_stop: Task failure: agent achieves perfect landings but takes ~940 steps because no time penalty or speed incentive exists. Dense absolute approach_region reward encourages hovering. Reflection and memory recommend a structural search for a mild time penalty or progress‑only reshape. No allowed operator can directly add a step penalty; thus structural_search is the correct action.
